languages.text: "Поддерживаю. Устав учит нас, что необходимо оставлять часть бойцов в резерве".
"I agree. The Handbook dictates that we always leave some of our fighters in reserve."
languages.original_text: "Поддерживаю. Устав учит нас, что необходимо оставлять часть бойцов в резерве".

traits.locale_text: "I agree. The Code dictates to always leave some of our fighters in reserve."
"I agree. The Code dictates that we always leave some of our fighters in reserve."
"You forget, Sergeant, that I have not always been a quartermaster, and have put down quite a few of the regiment's enemies!"
"I agree. The Code dictates to always leave some of our fighters in reserve."
"I agree. The Code dictates that we always leave some of our fighters in reserve."

languages.text: 「忘れないでください、軍曹、私はいつも軍需官ではなかったし、この連隊の敵を何人も倒したことがあるのです！」
languages.original_text: "You forget, Sergeant, that I have not always been a quartermaster, and have put down quite a few of the regiment's enemies!"

traits.locale_text: 「忘れないでください、軍曹、私はいつも軍需官ではなかったし、この連隊の敵を何人も倒したことがあるのです！」

languages.text: "Katılıyorum. El Kitabı bize daima savaşçılarımızın bir kısmını yedekte tutmamızı emreder."
languages.original_text: "I agree. The Handbook dictates that we always leave some of our fighters in reserve."

traits.locale_text: "Katılıyorum. El Kitabı bize daima savaşçılarımızın bir kısmını yedekte tutmamızı emreder."

languages.text: «Estoy de acuerdo. El manual dicta que siempre tengamos algún guerrero en la reserva».
languages.original_text: "I agree. The Handbook dictates that we always leave some of our fighters in reserve."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy de acuerdo. El manual dicta que siempre tengamos algún guerrero en la reserva».

languages.text: “我同意。《手册》写得很清楚，我们始终要保留一部分兵力作为预备队。”
languages.original_text: "I agree. The Handbook dictates that we always leave some of our fighters in reserve."

traits.locale_text: “我同意。《手册》写得很清楚，我们始终要保留一部分兵力作为预备队。”

languages.text: « Je suis d'accord. Le Manuel exige que nous laissions toujours des combattants en retrait. »
languages.original_text: "I agree. The Handbook dictates that we always leave some of our fighters in reserve."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis d'accord. Le Manuel exige que nous laissions toujours des combattants en retrait. »

languages.text: "Ja Das Handbuch verlangt, dass wir stets einige unserer Kämpfer in Reserve haben."
languages.original_text: "I agree. The Handbook dictates that we always leave some of our fighters in reserve."

traits.locale_text: "Ja Das Handbuch verlangt, dass wir stets einige unserer Kämpfer in Reserve haben."
